HGSS.679.0001:
By the way, you’re a Poké Maniac...
I can tell. Yes, you are.\f
But your knowledge is shallow still!\f
Do you know Bill?
He’s an incredible Poké Maniac.\r
I revere him.\f
I’ll teach you all I know about Bill,
so leave me your phone number. [0200,0000]
HGSS.679.0002:
Bill--he’s more than amazing!\f
To be a Poké Maniac like him someday...
That’s my dream.
HGSS.679.0003: You’re definitely going to regret it...
HGSS.679.0004:
I’ll teach you all I know about Bill,
so leave me your phone number. [0200,0000]
HGSS.679.0006:
Huh? Do you like to talk to
people nearby over the phone?\f
You know, this is how I talk to my
mother when I’m home?
HGSS.679.0007:
Oh yeah, I got an extremely rare
Pokémon in a trade a while back.\f
Do you want to know what it is?
Hehe, I’m keeping it a secret!\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0008:
Oh yeah, I took down this wild
[0100,000B,0000].\f
It wasn’t rare enough to bother
catching.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0009:
Oh yeah, I saw a rare Pokémon about
an hour ago.\f
It was my first sighting. But I
didn’t have any Poké Balls...\f
Would Bill laugh at my mistakes?\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0010:
Did you know...?
Bill’s father is supposed to be a\r
great Poké Maniac.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0011:
Did you know...?
Apparently Bill’s grandpa isn’t a\r
Poké Maniac.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0012:
Did you know...?
Bill’s originally from Goldenrod.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0013:
Did you know...?
Bill evidently lives on Route 25\r
in Kanto.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0014:
Did you know...?
ABRA was the first Pokémon that Bill\r
apparently caught.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0015:
Did you know...?
Bill’s younger sister apparently\r
can’t wink.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0016:
Did you know...?
Bill supposedly hates milk and\r
can’t drink it.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0017:
Did you know...?
Evidently, Bill isn’t very good at\r
battling.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0018:
Did you know...?
Bill appears to like the lady at the\r
Flower Shop.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0019:
Did you know...?
Bill’s mother is said to have been\r
a Kimono Girl.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0020:
Did you know...?
Bill’s mother is said to have been\r
a Kimono Girl.\f
So that’s it then.
HGSS.679.0021:
You’ve got time like usual, right?
Feel like having a battle?\f
It’ll be a chance to see my rare
Pokémon. It’ll be worth your time!\f
You know where--[0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.679.0022:
You want to see my rare Pokémon?
Hurry over to [0104,0003,0000].
HGSS.679.0023:
You wanted to hear about Bill?\f
Sorry, but I’m too busy for you.\f
I’ll call when I have time.
Much thanks!
